title: README / SECURITY Post-Public State Correction

security_reporting_channel.fallback: Open a minimal public issue that does not include exploit details or secrets and request a private reporting path.

broken_link_handling.reason: File exists in internal repository but was not included in the public snapshot. Internal readiness checklist — not a public developer resource. Removing prevents broken reference for public consumers.

private_data_secret_safety.notes: Only public GitHub URLs used. No private email, phone, internal hostname, internal path, or private remote added.

findings.description: README.md and SECURITY.md contained stale 'visibility pending GL-175' / 'Public GitHub release has not happened' wording
findings.resolution: All stale references removed; updated to state repository is publicly available (GL-176)

findings.description: SECURITY.md had no active security reporting channel for the now-public repository
findings.resolution: Added GitHub Security Advisories as active channel in Section 2; added explicit warning not to disclose exploit details or secrets publicly

findings.description: Public code surface improvement — future work
findings.resolution: Not addressed in GL-178; deferred as future work

findings.description: README.md had broken link to docs/public_github_readiness_pack.md (file not in public snapshot)
findings.resolution: Link removed from README.md; file is internal-only

findings.description: /home/adminuser in scanner script is a pattern definition, not leakage
findings.resolution: Confirmed not leakage; no action required

next_recommended_step: GL-179: Public snapshot correction push for GL-178 README/SECURITY fixes. Publish the GL-178 doc fixes to the public GitHub snapshot so the public-facing README.md and SECURITY.md reflect the corrected post-public state. Include public smoke follow-up verification after the push.
non_goals: Internal repo was not pushed directly to GitHub
No snapshot publish script behavior changes
No Paperclip references or status updates
F-003 (public code surface improvement) not addressed — future work
F-005 (/home/adminuser in scanner) not addressed — confirmed not leakage
